spec_match.rationale: The migration examples now use current behavior-first tokens for toolbar, radiogroup, tablist, and listbox.

interactive.rationale: The old mode now installs actual roving-key handlers and the new mode applies roles plus focusgroupstart, but chrome-devtools-mcp was unavailable for live verification.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The generated examples and summary table now teach current token strings rather than old axis-only values.

edge_cases.rationale: The page covers four common widget migrations, but browser evidence is still needed for wrapping, nomemory, and role-specific movement.

references.rationale: The page retains the required ChromeStatus link.

design_system.rationale: The status badges and tabs use shared variables and the page retains compact bordered panels.

openQuestions.title: Verify migration toggles in Chrome
openQuestions.detail: Use chrome-devtools-mcp to toggle Old/New for each card, arrow through both modes, confirm the old JS roving path and new native focusgroup path, and inspect console/network.

summary: Static repair updated all migration strings to current focusgroup tokens and made the comparison demos more functional; DevTools-MCP browser verification is still open.
